name: Vireshwar Kumar

work.note: Official IIT Delhi sources identify Vireshwar Kumar as an assistant professor in CSE at IIT Delhi.

tracking.note: Official IIT Delhi sources provide explicit undergraduate, doctoral, postdoctoral, and advisor-side supervision history.

sources.note: Ranking page provides a DBLP author id and a current affiliation, but no lineage details.

The official IIT Delhi homepage states that Vireshwar Kumar is an Assistant Professor in CSE at IIT Delhi, received a B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering at IIT Delhi, obtained his Ph.D. in Computer Engineering under the guidance of Prof. Jerry Park at Virginia Tech, and worked as a postdoctoral research associate at Purdue under Prof. Dongyan Xu.
The official IIT Delhi SPRING Lab team page repeats the postdoctoral research associate position at Purdue University and identifies Vireshwar Kumar as Assistant Professor at IIT Delhi.
The official IIT Delhi group page lists current students with `Advisor: Prof Vireshwar Kumar`, including Avinash Jha.

summary: Official IIT Delhi sources identify Vireshwar Kumar as IIT Delhi faculty, state that he earned a B.Tech. at IIT Delhi and a Ph.D. in Computer Engineering at Virginia Tech under Jerry Park, held a postdoctoral research position at Purdue under Dongyan Xu, and advises current IIT Delhi students.

undergraduate.note: The official IIT Delhi homepage states `I received my B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering at IIT Delhi`.

masters.note: The reviewed official IIT Delhi sources do not mention a master's degree for Vireshwar Kumar.

phd.note: The official IIT Delhi homepage states `I obtained my Ph.D. degree in Computer Engineering under the guidance of Prof. Jerry Park at Virginia Tech`.

postdoc.note: The official IIT Delhi homepage states `Before returning back to IIT Delhi, I also worked as a Postdoctoral Research Associate in the Department of Computer Science at Purdue University under the supervision of Prof. Dongyan Xu`.
